group_code.description: This is the code used for grouping result data.
group_code.title: Group code

is_abnormal.description: If true, the result will be flagged for the doctor's attention
is_abnormal.title: Is abnormal

normal_range.description: When ``value_is_numeric`` is True, this parameter must be a string of the form ``"<lower> <upper>", where both lower and upper are numerical``
normal_range.title: Normal range

abnormal_status.description:
Value | Notes
----- | -----
`'L'` | `'low'`
`'LL'` | `'alert low'`
`'H'` | `'high'`
`'HH'` | `'alert high'`
`'<'` | `'panic low'`
`'>'` | `'panic high'`
`'A'` | `'abnormal'`
`'AA'` | `'very abnormal'`
`'S'` | `'susceptible'`
`'R'` | `'resistant'`
`'I'` | `'intermediate'`
`'NEG'` | `'negative'`
`'POS'` | `'positive'`
`'N'` | `'normal'`
`''` | `'no comment'`
abnormal_status.title: Abnormal status

lab_order.description: ID of `/lab_orders` object the result belongs to
lab_order.title: Lab order

document.description: ID of `/lab_documents` object for the result
document.title: Document

lab_test.description: ID of `/lab_tests` object for the result
lab_test.title: Lab test
